title: Collections Internals
content:
# Java Revision

*   **Escape Analysis:** C2 JIT optimization allocating local objects on the Stack instead of the Heap.
*   **Generics PECS:** Producer Extends (read-only); Consumer Super (write-only).
*   **ZGC:** Low-latency collector using colored reference pointers and load barriers to keep pauses under 10ms.


*   **Collections Internals Checklist:** Verify input ranges and clear caches.
